uploadLeadImage.cropDescription: Adjust how your image is framed, then save. Drag to reposition and use zoom to fit the banner area (JPEG, PNG, or WebP — max 4 MB).
uploadLeadImage.fileTooLarge: Your image is too large (max 4 MB) and could not be uploaded. Resize it and try again.

OnboardingAdventure.title: Your Adventure starts here.
OnboardingAdventure.subtitle: You have a powerful vision for the world - we give you the tools to put it into action.

aiHero.title: Build Anything, Together
aiHero.description: Tell Hypha AI what you want to build, and it will guide setup step by step.
aiHero.placeholder: Create a space, join an existing one, explore the network, or fund a treasury - describe your goal and AI will guide you.

rotating.createSpace: Ask Hypha AI to create a space for your mission...
rotating.governance: Ask Hypha AI to draft governance for your community...
rotating.joinSpace: Ask Hypha AI to help you join the right space...
rotating.treasury: Ask Hypha AI to set up a treasury-ready space...
rotating.explore: Ask Hypha AI to find opportunities across the network...

aiHero.handoffFailed: Could not start AI conversation. Please try again.
aiHero.handoffTimeout: AI handoff is taking longer than expected. Please try again.
aiHero.sendFailed: Prompt could not be sent to AI. Please retry.
aiHero.helper: AI will propose each action and ask for confirmation before creating or updating anything.
aiHero.unavailable: AI onboarding is temporarily unavailable on this deployment.

flow.reviewingDescription: AI is mapping the best path for your goal.
flow.reviewingDescriptionPersonalized: {firstName}, AI is mapping the best path for your goal.
flow.confirmingDescription: You will get a focused choice before any write action.
flow.executingDescription: AI is now creating, joining, or routing based on your choice.
flow.routingTitle: Taking you to the right destination
flow.routingDescription: Finalizing navigation to your space or selected screen.
flow.confirmationHint: You stay in control: AI asks for confirmation before any create or update action.

OnboardingAdventure.searchToSeeSpaces: Start typing to see matching spaces.

explore.title: Explore the Network
explore.description: Discover communities and opportunities across the network.

create.title: Create your Space
create.description: Start a new space and invite others to collaborate.

join.title: Join a Space
join.description: Pick a space and jump directly into its activity.
join.unavailable: No spaces are currently available to join.

deposit.title: Deposit Funds in a Space
deposit.description: Choose a space with a treasury address to fund it.
deposit.unavailable: No spaces with treasury addresses are currently available.

depositDetails.title: Deposit details
depositDetails.description: Fund {spaceName} treasury using the address below.
depositDetails.networkWarning: Warning: transfer funds on the BASE Network only.

MyWallet.signInToViewWallet: Sign in to view your wallet.

loading.keepWindowOpen: Keep this window open until we're finished.

subscribe.title: Subscribe to Notifications
subscribe.subscribedDescription: You’re subscribed to notifications. Click unsubscribe at any time to stop receiving alerts.
subscribe.unsubscribedDescription: Click subscribe to receive notifications. Some browsers block notifications by default, so you may need to enable them using the padlock icon next to the address bar or in your browser’s settings.

channels.title: Notification Channels
channels.description: Choose how you’d like to receive notifications:

newProposalOpen.title: A new proposal is open for vote
newProposalOpen.description: In any of the spaces you're a member of.

proposalApprovedOrRejected.title: A proposal is approved or rejected
proposalApprovedOrRejected.description: In any of the spaces you're a member of.

mentionOnChatMessage.title: You are mentioned in a chat message
mentionOnChatMessage.description: In any thread or chat where mentions are enabled for you.

nestedSpacesButton.label: Space Navigation
nestedSpacesButton.noAccess: You do not have access to view space navigation.

error.title: Unable to load token holdings
error.description: Please retry in a moment. If this persists, check your space access and network connectivity.
error.accessDeniedDescription: You do not currently have permission to view token holdings for this space.

empty.title: No token holdings available yet
empty.description: This space does not currently expose minted token distribution data.

activity.title: Unable to load activity widgets
activity.error: Please retry in a moment. Activity analytics data may still be syncing.

distribution.title: Distribution over time
distribution.subtitle: X axis shows time from transaction dates.
distribution.error: Unable to load token distribution history right now.
distribution.empty: No transfer history found for the selected filters.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Cumulative monthly members and spaces (net of exits)

signals.title: Signals
signals.subtitle: Heat map by priority and recency (recent left, older right)

energy.title: Energy
energy.description: Energy widgets will appear once energy data is available.

SpaceSettingsAction.title: Space Settings
SpaceSettingsAction.content: Access and manage the settings for your space, including its appearance, structure, methods, membership, and treasury.

spaceConfiguration.title: Space Configuration
spaceConfiguration.description: Customise your space by setting its purpose, adding branding elements, and linking social media.

spaceTransparencyConfiguration.title: Space Transparency Configuration
spaceTransparencyConfiguration.description: Define the level of transparency you collectively want to apply to your space.

addSpace.title: Add Space
addSpace.description: Create a new space within your organisation for activities, teams, or projects.

activateSpaces.title: Activate Space(s)
activateSpaces.description: Contribute HYPHA or USDC to activate your space(s) and support the Hypha Network.

votingMethod.title: Voting Method
votingMethod.description: Select and configure the voting method for decision-making within your space.

entryMethod.title: Entry Method
entryMethod.description: Select and configure the process by which new members join your space.

membershipExit.title: Membership Exit
membershipExit.description: Remove a member from your space if they infringe upon agreed rules and policies.

spaceToSpaceMembership.title: Space-to-Space Membership
spaceToSpaceMembership.description: Allow your space to join another space as a member, gaining the ability to participate in governance and vote on proposals.

changeSpaceDelegate.title: Change Delegate
changeSpaceDelegate.description: Update the member who votes on behalf of your space in a space you have already joined.

issueNewToken.title: Issue New Token
issueNewToken.description: Create a new token for utility, ownership, impact, cash credits, voice, or community currency within your space.

updateIssuedToken.title: Update Issued Token
updateIssuedToken.description: Update advanced token settings, including the token name, symbol and icon, total supply, auto-minting options, transfer controls, voice decay parameters, and the token value displayed in the treasury.

mintTokensToSpaceTreasury.title: Mint Tokens to Space Treasury
mintTokensToSpaceTreasury.description: Mint tokens into your space treasury to fund operations, distribute rewards, or provide liquidity.

tokenBurning.title: Burn Tokens on Specified Spaces or Wallets
tokenBurning.description: Remove (burn) tokens from chosen spaces or wallet addresses. This action reduces the total token supply and can be used to manage circulation or correct allocations.

tokenBackingVault.title: Token Backing Vault
tokenBackingVault.description: Create a token backing vault, define redemption rules and restrictions, set the start date and redemption price, and authorise the addition or withdrawal of collateral to the vault.

buyHyphaTokensRewards.title: Buy Hypha Tokens (Rewards)
buyHyphaTokensRewards.description: Purchase Hypha tokens to participate in the network and earn rewards.

spaceTokenPurchase.title: Enable Space Token Purchase
spaceTokenPurchase.description: Allow your members to purchase your space's native tokens.

redeemTokens.title: Redeem Tokens
redeemTokens.description: Convert tokens in the treasury into their equivalent fiat value held in the Space Token Issuer vault.

depositFunds.title: Deposit Funds
depositFunds.description: Deposit funds into your treasury by copying the treasury address or scanning the QR code.

integrateSmartContractInSpace.title: Integrate Smart Contract in Space (Advanced)
integrateSmartContractInSpace.description: Enable your space to take multisig ownership of your smart contracts, allowing your community to govern value flows (tokenomics) directly from your space.

exploreExtensionsMarketplaceComingSoon.title: Explore Extensions & Plug-in Marketplace (Coming Soon)
exploreExtensionsMarketplaceComingSoon.description: Discover a growing ecosystem of tools and integrations to extend your space's capabilities.

hyphaEnergy.title: Hypha Energy
hyphaEnergy.description: A dedicated platform for your renewable energy community or hub, enabling local energy sharing, energy asset co-ownership, governance, and fair value distribution between members.

SelectCreateAction.title: Create a Proposal
SelectCreateAction.content: Select an action to contribute, collaborate, make decisions or manage resources within your space.

makeCollectiveAgreement.title: Make a Collective Agreement
makeCollectiveAgreement.description: Define and formalise a mutual understanding, policy, or decision among members of the space.

proposeContribution.title: Propose a Contribution
proposeContribution.description: Propose a new contribution, such as work, knowledge, capital, or resources, for the space to consider.

payExpenses.title: Pay Expenses for Products or Services
payExpenses.description: Make payments for products and services by transferring funds from your space treasury to another space, entity, or individual wallet.

acceptInvestment.title: Accept Investment
acceptInvestment.description: Receive capital from investors, members, or aligned spaces in exchange for native space tokens, settled via escrow.

exchangeStakesAndTokens.title: Exchange Stakes & Tokens
exchangeStakesAndTokens.description: Swap tokens between members and spaces, settled via escrow when both sides have funded.

deployFunds.title: Deploy Funds
deployFunds.description: Allocate treasury funds for investments in other spaces in the network or for distributing resources across spaces within your organisation.

airdrop.title: Airdrop Tokens
airdrop.description: Distribute tokens to one or more recipients by transferring them from your space treasury or minting tokens created by your space.

depositFunds.title: Deposit Funds
depositFunds.description: Deposit funds into your treasury by copying the treasury address or scanning the QR code.

SelectActivateAction.title: Activate Space
SelectActivateAction.content: Choose one of the options below to activate your Space and unlock all the features available on the Hypha Network.

depositFunds.title: Deposit Funds
depositFunds.description: Deposit funds into your treasury by copying the treasury address or scanning the QR code.

buyHyphaTokensRewards.title: Buy Hypha Tokens (Rewards)
buyHyphaTokensRewards.description: Purchase Hypha tokens to participate in the network and earn rewards.

activateSpaces.title: Activate Space(s)
activateSpaces.description: Contribute HYPHA or USDC to activate your space(s) and support the Hypha Network.

SelectNavigationAction.title: Space Navigation
SelectNavigationAction.content: Navigate all your spaces in a single interactive map to see how they connect to each other. Easily visit nested spaces, explore space-to-space memberships, and follow value flows across your direct ecosystem.

visibleSpaces.noAccessAddSpace: You do not have access to add spaces to this organization.

delegateSection.title: Delegate to Member
delegateSection.description: Select a member of this space to receive your voting power.

MembersTab.aiAgentsEmptyState: No AI agents mobilized yet. Ask strategic questions to activate them.
MembersTab.aiAgentsMobilizedCount: Mobilized {count, plural, one {# time} other {# times}}

BankingTab.title: Bank Transfers
BankingTab.subtitle: Receive bank transfers into your treasury and manage space deposit accounts.
BankingTab.returnBanner: Welcome back — we're checking your verification status.
BankingTab.returnBannerApprovedHint: Verification is complete. Open a space account to add any remaining currencies.
BankingTab.errorLoad: Could not load bank account status.

transfers.title: One-time Bank Transfers
transfers.emptyDescription: Create a one-time transfer when you need a single incoming payment without setting up a full deposit account.

accounts.title: Bank Accounts
accounts.emptyDescription: Open a space account and choose which currencies you need. We'll set up deposit details for each one.
accounts.pendingDescription: Finish verification in Bridge to activate the currencies you selected. Your accounts will be created automatically once approved.
accounts.signInHint: Sign in to manage bank accounts.

openAccount.title: Open a space account
openAccount.description: Tell us about your organization and which currencies you need. We'll verify your space once, then create accounts for each currency.
openAccount.descriptionAddCurrency: Choose additional currencies to add deposit accounts for your space.
openAccount.descriptionAddCurrencySingle: Choose the deposit currency for this bank account. Additional verification from the provider may be required.
openAccount.bankAccountDepositHint: Currency this bank account will receive.
openAccount.currenciesHint: Select every currency you want to receive bank transfers in.
openAccount.currenciesHintSingle: Select a currency you want to receive bank transfers in.
openAccount.noCurrenciesAvailable: All supported bank accounts are already open for this space.
openAccount.railsNeedVerificationHint: These rails need provider verification before you can use them.
openAccount.redirectPendingDescription: Accept terms and complete verification to activate your selected currencies.

toolbar.allCurrenciesCovered: All supported currencies already have accounts

operationStatus.pendingKybHint: Complete business verification in Bridge to activate this request.
operationStatus.pendingActivationHint: Verification is complete. Activate to generate deposit instructions.
operationStatus.activateFailed: We couldn't complete setup. Please try again later. If the problem continues, contact us.
operationStatus.openGearForVerification: Click to open verification details and Bridge links.

advanced.dataMinimizationNotice: Deposit and verification details are loaded from our banking partner and are not saved on Hypha servers.
advanced.noCustomer: No bank customer record for this space yet.
advanced.approvedSummary: Verification is approved. Manage your supported currencies in the section below.
advanced.approvedOnBridgePendingRecord: Bridge shows verification as approved. Activate a pending request below to record approval and finish setup.
advanced.currencyStatusesDescription: Per-currency endorsement status from Bridge and account setup progress.
advanced.currencyStatusesDescriptionAdd: Add support for a currency rail. Bridge may require additional verification for some regions.
advanced.requestRailDisabledInitialSetup: Complete your current verification before requesting additional currency rails
advanced.sofProcedureHint: This step requires a source of funds questionnaire. Click the link to complete it in the Bridge verification portal.
advanced.uboPendingDescription: {count, plural, one {# associated person still needs} other {# associated persons still need}} to provide additional information.
advanced.uboPendingTooltip: Bridge sends verification emails directly to associated persons. Ask them to check their inbox (and spam folder) for an email from Bridge or Persona.

procedureHints.fallback: No further action is required for this step in Bridge right now.

tos.complete: Terms of service have been accepted. No further action is required here.
tos.pending: Terms are still pending on Bridge.

kyb.complete: Business verification is complete. No further action is required here.
kyb.not_started: Open the verification link to start your organization verification.
kyb.incomplete: Complete and submit the verification form in Bridge to continue.
kyb.awaiting_questionnaire: Bridge requires additional information. Check your email or the verification portal for the questionnaire.
kyb.awaiting_ubo: Awaiting the ultimate beneficial owners (UBOs) listed in the KYB form to complete the verification sent by email.
kyb.under_review: Your submission is under review with Bridge. This can take from a few hours to several days.
kyb.approved: Business verification is complete. No further action is required here.
kyb.rejected: Verification was declined. Contact support if you believe this is an error.
kyb.paused: Verification is paused. Contact support for assistance.
kyb.offboarded: Banking verification is no longer available for this customer. Contact support for assistance.

pending.title: Terms not accepted
pending.description: Accept the terms of service to continue.

approved.title: Terms accepted
approved.description: Terms of service have been accepted.

initialSetup.organizationHint: Organization details are sent to our banking partner for verification and are not stored on Hypha.
initialSetup.currenciesDescription: Select the currencies this space will accept by bank transfer. We verify your organization once with our banking partner.
initialSetup.currenciesHint: You can add more currencies later from Banking settings.

notStarted.description: Banking is not set up for this space yet.

blockers.notOnChain: This space must be deployed on-chain before a linked bank account can be set up.
blockers.noTreasury: This space must have an on-chain treasury address before a linked bank account can be set up.

BankingTab.verificationInProgress: Verification is in progress. This typically takes a few hours to a few days. If you need to take action, use the link below.

corridors.addDisabledNotManager: Only space members with treasury access can manage bank accounts.

transferCard.feeHint: Developer fee: 0% · Provider fees may apply

transferDetails.title: One-time transfer
transferDetails.description: The payer must include the reference message on their bank transfer so Bridge can match the deposit.
transferDetails.referenceWarning: The sender must include the payment reference below in the wire memo, ACH description, or SEPA reference. Without it, the provider cannot match the deposit.

usd-ach.label: USD — local (ACH)
usd-ach.hint: Domestic US bank transfers via ACH

usd-wire.label: USD — international (wire)
usd-wire.hint: International wire transfers in US dollars

createTransfer.title: New one-time transfer
createTransfer.description: Create deposit instructions for a single incoming transfer. Funds are converted to a stablecoin (USDC or EURC) in your treasury.
createTransfer.corridorHint: Select how the payer will send funds. This determines the deposit instructions.
createTransfer.flexibleAmountHint: The payer can send any amount.
createTransfer.noCorridorsAvailable: No transfer rails are available for this space.

depositInstructions.providerFeesNote: *The provider may charge additional fees on operations.

sandboxDemo.title: Sandbox / Dev — KYB simulation
sandboxDemo.description: KYB is a manual step, so it must be simulated in sandbox. This can bypass filling in the form completely as well.

onboardingDialog.title: Enable bank deposits
onboardingDialog.description: We use this information to verify your organization. Once approved, your space will be set up to receive bank transfers.
onboardingDialog.endorsementsHint: These are Bridge KYB endorsements (e.g. base for USD, sepa for EUR). Each selected rail is included in the verification link.

not_started.title: Verification not started
not_started.description: Open the verification link to provide your organization details.

incomplete.title: Verification incomplete
incomplete.description: Your verification form has not been submitted yet.

awaiting_questionnaire.title: Additional information required
awaiting_questionnaire.description: Please complete the additional questionnaire to continue verification.

awaiting_ubo.title: Awaiting UBO verification
awaiting_ubo.description: Awaiting the ultimate beneficial owners (UBOs) listed in the KYB form to complete the verification sent by email.

under_review.title: Under review
under_review.description: Your verification has been submitted and is being reviewed. This can take from a few hours to several days.

approved.title: Verification approved
approved.description: Your organization is verified. Add currencies below to open deposit accounts.

rejected.title: Verification declined
rejected.description: Your organization could not be verified. Contact support if you believe this is an error.

paused.title: Verification paused
paused.description: Verification is temporarily paused. Contact support for assistance.

offboarded.title: Linked bank account unavailable
offboarded.description: Linked bank accounts are no longer available for this space. Contact support for assistance.

unknown.title: Status unavailable
unknown.description: We could not determine the current verification status. Try refreshing.

depositFunds.description: Add tokens to your personal wallet by copying your wallet address or scanning the QR code.

transferFunds.title: Transfer Funds
transferFunds.description: Send tokens from your personal wallet to a member, space, or custom address.

migrateHyphaTokens.title: Migrate Hypha Tokens (Telos → Base)

Spaces.spaceLinkDescription: Your space name is automatically added to the end of your space link. You can edit it if needed, but it must remain unique.
Spaces.sandboxDescription: Use Sandbox Mode to configure and test your space only on My Spaces, sharing it with your team via URL while laying the foundation for regenerative purpose.
Spaces.pilotDescription: Use Pilot Mode to share your space for demos, use case validation, or as a replicable template. Expand your reach, activate member participation, and gather feedback.
Spaces.liveDescription: Use Live Mode to make your space fully operational and publicly discoverable, generating sustainable value and turning your purpose into regenerative impact.
Spaces.archiveDescription: Archive this space to temporarily pause activity or deactivate it while keeping all data and history safe. You can reactivate it anytime by selecting a different activation mode.
Spaces.selectCategoryError: Please select at least one tag category.
Spaces.selectParentError: Please select a linked space or enable "Root Space"
Spaces.slugFieldRegex: This field can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and apostrophes.

Spaces.becomeMemberOrRequestInvite: Become a member or request invite
Spaces.inviteAlreadySubmitted: You’ve already submitted your invite request. Your proposal is now visible to space members for review. If needed, you’ll be able to resubmit 24 hours after your last submission.
Spaces.tokenRequirements: You’re not able to join just yet. Fulfil the token requirements to gain access.
Spaces.exitSpaceConfirmDescription: Do you really want to exit this space?
Spaces.exitSpaceDisabledTooltip: You need to be authorized and to be a member of the current space to be able to exit
Spaces.accessDeniedNotLoggedIn: You need an active account to access this section. Please sign in or click Get Started to create one.
Spaces.accessDeniedNotMember: You need to become a member to access this feature. Join the space now to view the activity of this space.
Spaces.errorOhSnap: Oh snap! There was an error
Spaces.trialBannerTitle: Only {daysLeft} days left in your free trial!
Spaces.trialBannerSubtitle: Contribute $11 per month in USDC or Hypha tokens to the Hypha Network to unlock full access for your Space and keep your progress going!
Spaces.beforeExpiryBannerTitle: Only {daysLeft} days left before your Hypha Network contribution expires!
Spaces.beforeExpiryBannerSubtitle: Don’t lose access to your Space features! Renew now by contributing $11 per month in USDC or Hypha tokens to the Hypha Network.
Spaces.expiredBannerTitle: Your Hypha Network contribution expired {daysAgo} days ago!
Spaces.expiredBannerSubtitle: Reactivate now by contributing $11 per month in USDC or Hypha tokens to the Hypha Network and regain access to all your Space features.
Spaces.proposalExpiredSubtitle: Your Hypha Network contribution expired {expiredElapsed}. Please reactivate your space before submitting a new proposal.
Spaces.rootSpaceDescription: Marking this space as a Root Space will make it independent. It will no longer be linked to the current organisation, and all of its linked spaces will move with it.
Spaces.ecosystemLogoLightDescription: Upload a light-mode logo for your ecosystem (PNG, JPG, GIF, or WEBP).
Spaces.ecosystemLogoDarkDescription: Upload a dark-mode logo for your ecosystem (PNG, JPG, GIF, or WEBP).
Spaces.exchangeDepositProposalTitleBanner: Complete this space's side of an exchange
Spaces.exchangeDepositProposalBody: An exchange proposal lists this space as counterparty (escrow #{escrowId}). Create a proposal to deposit <send></send> and receive <receive></receive> from the other party.
Spaces.exchangeDepositProposalDescription: Approve and deposit {payAmount} {paySymbol} into escrow (#{escrowId}) to complete the exchange with {otherParty}. In return, {activeSpace} will receive {receiveAmount} {receiveSymbol}.
Spaces.investmentDepositProposalDescription: Approve and deposit {payAmount} {paySymbol} into escrow (#{escrowId}) to complete the investment into {otherParty}. In return, {activeSpace} will receive {receiveAmount} {receiveSymbol}.
Spaces.acceptInvestmentBody: {sellerLabel} has accepted your space's investment of {buyerAmountLabel} and offers {sellerAmountLabel} in return.
Spaces.acceptInvestmentBodyPersonal: {sellerLabel} has accepted your investment of {buyerAmountLabel} and offers {sellerAmountLabel} in return.
Spaces.exchangeStakesAndTokensBody: {sellerLabel} has proposed to exchange {sellerAmountLabel} for {buyerAmountLabel} from your space.
Spaces.exchangeStakesAndTokensBodyPersonal: {sellerLabel} has proposed to exchange {sellerAmountLabel} for {buyerAmountLabel} from you.
Spaces.escrowDepositInsufficientWallet: Your wallet balance is below the required amount.

pageErrors.loadSpaces: Failed to load spaces. Please try again later.

insufficientFunds.spaceWalletBalanceInsufficient: Space wallet balance is insufficient to complete this transaction.
insufficientFunds.fullMessage: Space wallet balance is insufficient. Please <topUpLink>top up your account with {token}</topUpLink> to proceed.

insufficientFunds.walletBalanceInsufficient: Your wallet balance is insufficient to complete this transaction.
insufficientFunds.fullMessage: Your wallet balance is insufficient. Please <topUpLink>top up with {token}</topUpLink> to proceed.

proposalErrors.recipientRequired: Please add a recipient or wallet address
proposalErrors.atLeastOnePayoutRequired: At least one payout is required
proposalErrors.atLeastOneAirdropRecipient: At least one airdrop recipient is required
proposalErrors.tooManyAirdropRecipients: Too many recipients for one airdrop proposal.
proposalErrors.selectSpaceToActivate: Please select a space to activate.
proposalErrors.monthsToActivateRequired: Please enter the number of months to activate.
proposalErrors.selectSpaceToJoin: Please select a space to join
proposalErrors.selectDelegatedVotingMember: Please select a delegated voting member
proposalErrors.selectSpaceToExit: Please select a space to exit.
proposalErrors.selectMemberToRemove: Please select a member to remove
proposalErrors.positiveTokenNumberRequired: Please specify a positive number of tokens.
proposalErrors.selectMemberAndTokens: Please select a member and specify the number of tokens to allocate.
proposalErrors.autoExecutionVotingDurationRequired: Auto-execution is disabled. Please set a minimum voting duration.
proposalErrors.selectVotingToken: Please select a token to pursue with this voting method.
proposalErrors.atLeastOneBurnTargetRequired: At least one burn target is required
proposalErrors.redemptionTokenPriceRequired: Token price is required when redemption is active. Enter a price greater than 0.
proposalErrors.redemptionReferenceCurrencyRequired: Reference currency is required when redemption is active.
proposalErrors.redemptionMaxPercentRequired: Maximum Redemption % is required when redemption is active. Enter 0 for no limit.
proposalErrors.redemptionPeriodDaysRequired: Period (days) is required when Redemption is active. Select a redemption period.
proposalErrors.redemptionStartDateRequired: Authorise Redemption from date is required when Redemption is active.
proposalErrors.acceptInvestmentExactSendRows: Exactly one token row is required under Investing member will send.
proposalErrors.acceptInvestmentExactReceiveRows: Exactly one token row is required under Investing Member will Receive.

issueNewTokenForm.duplicateToken: A token with the same name and symbol already exists in your space. Please modify either the name or symbol to proceed.

errors.titleRequired: Please add a title for your proposal
errors.descriptionRequired: Please add content to your proposal
errors.slugFormat: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
errors.fileTooLarge: Your file is too large and exceeds the 4MB limit. Please upload a smaller file.
errors.imageFileType: File must be an image (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WEBP).
errors.leadImageUrlInvalid: Lead Image URL must be a valid URL
errors.attachmentUrlInvalid: Attachment URL must be a valid URL
errors.attachmentsLimit: You can attach up to 3 files. Please remove the extra attachments.
errors.attachmentFileTooLarge: Your file "{fileName}" is too large and exceeds the 4MB limit. Please upload a smaller file.
errors.attachmentFileTypeUnsupported: This file "{fileName}" format isn’t supported. Please upload a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or PDF (up to 4MB).
errors.tokenNameMin: Please enter a token name (min. 2 characters)
errors.tokenNameMax: Token name must be at most 100 characters long
errors.tokenNameInvalidContent: Token name cannot contain emojis or links
errors.tokenSymbolMin: Please enter a token symbol (min. 2 characters)
errors.tokenSymbolMax: Token symbol must be at most 10 characters long
errors.tokenSymbolUppercase: Please enter the token symbol using only uppercase letters (A–Z)
errors.tokenSymbolInvalidContent: Token symbol cannot contain emojis or links
errors.tokenIconUrlInvalid: Icon URL must be a valid URL
errors.maxSupplyMinZero: Max supply must be 0 or greater
errors.maxSupplyNonNegative: Max supply must be a non-negative number
errors.maxSupplyTypeRequired: Please select a max supply type
errors.maxSupplyUpdatablePositive: Max supply must be greater than 0 when updatable type is selected
errors.maxSupplyLimitedPositiveOrDisable: Enter a maximum supply greater than 0, or disable limited supply if you want unlimited supply.
errors.voiceDecayFrequencyRequired: Please enter a voice decay frequency
errors.voiceDecayFrequencyPositive: Voice decay frequency must be greater than 0
errors.voiceDecayPercentageRequired: Please enter a voice decay percentage
errors.voiceDecayPercentagePositive: Voice decay percentage must be greater than 0
errors.blockchainAddressInvalid: Please enter a valid blockchain address
errors.tokenPricePositive: Please enter a token price greater than 0
errors.duplicateWhitelistEntry: This member or space is already listed in this whitelist. Remove the duplicate or choose a different entry.
errors.creditLimitPositive: Please enter a credit limit greater than 0

createAgreementBaseFields.addAttachmentLabel: Add Attachment (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or PDF — max 4MB)

errors.memoryAttachmentsRequired: Please upload at least one document for this memory.

loadingBackdrop.keepWindowOpen: Keep this window open until we're finished.

proposalLoader.tryAgainGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

airdrop.description: Distribute tokens to one or more recipients. Choose to transfer tokens already held in your space treasury, or mint new tokens that your space has created.
airdrop.noMintableTokens: Your space has not created any mintable tokens yet. Issue a token first, or use the Transfer method.

buyHyphaTokens.receiveHyphaTokens: Our space will receive {amount} HYPHA tokens (1 HYPHA = {price} USD)

tokenBackingVault.title: Token Backing Vault
tokenBackingVault.description: Create a token backing vault, define redemption rules and restrictions, set the start date and redemption price, and authorise the addition or withdrawal of collateral to the vault.
tokenBackingVault.noTokens: Your space has not yet created a token, <link>click here</link> to first issue a token.
tokenBackingVault.addCollateralsDescription: Add backing collaterals from the treasury to the vault.
tokenBackingVault.removeCollateralsDescription: Withdraw backing collaterals from the vault to the treasury.
tokenBackingVault.redemptionWhitelistDescription: Specify which members or spaces are authorised to redeem tokens.
tokenBackingVault.leaveBlankUseTokenPrice: Leave blank to use token price ({price} {currency})
tokenBackingVault.leaveBlankForTokenContractPrice: Leave blank for token contract price

errors.spaceNotReady: Your space isn't fully loaded yet. Please refresh the page and try again.
errors.spaceNotOnChain: Your space hasn't been published on-chain yet, so a backing vault can't be created. Publish the space first, then come back to create the vault.

general.title: General
general.description: Select your token type and customize its name, symbol, and icon for clear identification.
general.customizeIdentityDescription: Customize token name, symbol, and icon for clear identification.

utility.label: Utility Token
utility.description: used for access or functionality within the space

ownership.label: Ownership Token
ownership.description: reflects stake or equity in the space

impact.label: Impact Token
impact.description: values measurable social, economic, and environmental outcomes

credits.label: Cash Credits
credits.description: redeemable credits that can be exchanged for fiat currency

voice.label: Voice Token
voice.description: provides a voice in management or decision making within the space

community_currency.label: Community Currency
community_currency.description: local currency used for transactions and value exchange within the community

advancedSettings.title: Advanced Token Settings (Optional)
advancedSettings.description: Defaults are pre-configured for standard use. Only enable advanced settings if you'd like to configure supply caps, manual minting, transfer policies and whitelists, or set a token value.

supply.title: Token Supply
supply.description: Choose a fixed or unlimited token supply. Select “Limited Supply” to set a maximum token amount, either permanently or with an option to update in the future.
supply.maxSupplyReadOnlyWhenImmutable: Max supply is fixed while Forever Immutable is selected
supply.maxSupplyTypeReadOnlyWhenImmutableOnChai: Max supply type is fixed on-chain and cannot be changed
supply.maxSupplyTypeHelp: Choosing "Forever Immutable" locks in the maximum supply permanently and blocks any future changes. Select "Updatable Over Time" if you may raise the cap later (for example via gradual or milestone-based releases), or leave limited supply turned off to keep supply unlimited.

autoMint.title: Auto-Mint Tokens via Proposals
autoMint.description: When enabled, tokens are automatically minted to the treasury each time a proposal is approved. Disable this if you prefer to manage a pre-set budget by minting tokens to the treasury manually in advance.
autoMint.disabledNotice: Auto-minting is disabled. Tokens must now be issued through a separate minting proposal, which can be accessed in the settings.

transfer.title: Token Transfer
transfer.description: Control who can send and receive your token. You can make it fully transferable, restrict transfers to whitelisted accounts or spaces, or disable transfers entirely for maximum control.
transfer.advancedControlsDescription: For more control, you can optionally enable whitelisting. This restricts token transfers to only selected members, spaces, or blockchain addresses that you specify. If you don’t enable this option, tokens remain freely transferable to all accounts.
transfer.autoWhitelistedNotice: {spaceName} and its members are automatically whitelisted. Listing space(s) and/or member(s) below allows them to send ("From" Whitelist) or receive ("To" Whitelist) tokens when whitelisting is enabled.
transfer.toWhitelistDescription: Define which members or spaces are allowed to receive tokens. Add members or spaces, include blockchain addresses, and choose if the whitelisting applies to an entire space or just its treasury account.
transfer.fromWhitelistDescription: Define which members or spaces are allowed to send tokens. Add members or spaces, include blockchain addresses, and choose if the whitelisting applies to an entire space or just its treasury account.

whitelist.memberOrSpaceDescription: Choose whether this entry targets an individual member or an entire space.
whitelist.spaceAccessScopeDescription: Toggle whether transfers should include the entire space membership or only the space account.

value.title: Token Value on Treasury
value.description: Set an initial value for your token. The reference price is displayed in your treasury and helps members understand the token’s starting market value.

mutualCredit.title: Mutual Credit
mutualCredit.description: Allow members of whitelisted spaces to spend below zero up to a per-account credit limit. Net balance turns negative when credit is drawn.
mutualCredit.eligibleSpacesDescription: Members of these spaces can draw on the credit line. The issuing space is always included.

authorizedMinters.title: Authorized Minters
authorizedMinters.description: Grant specific wallet addresses the right to mint, burn, and manage the credit whitelist on this token, in addition to the space executor.
authorizedMinters.listDescription: These wallets can mint, burn, and manage the credit whitelist for this token.
authorizedMinters.revokeDescription: These wallets will have their minter rights removed.
authorizedMinters.invalid: Please enter a valid blockchain address
authorizedMinters.duplicate: This address has already been added

quorumAndUnity.title: Voting Method
quorumAndUnity.description: Select a voting method template, or adjust Quorum and Unity values with the sliders.
quorumAndUnity.autoExecutionDisabled: Auto-execution is disabled when quorum is below 20% to protect treasury assets.
quorumAndUnity.minDurationUnavailableNotConnected: Minimum voting duration is unavailable until the space is connected.
quorumAndUnity.minDurationLoadError: Could not load minimum voting duration from the network. Try again later.
quorumAndUnity.cannotBothZero: Quorum and unity cannot both be set to 0%

recipient.memoPlaceholder: Add any relevant notes or details about this transaction

redeemTokensProposal.requestedExceedsTreasury: Requested redemption amount exceeds treasury balance ({amount} requested vs {balance} {symbol} available).
redeemTokensProposal.collateralInsufficient: The redemption value exceeds the collateral in the vault; enter a smaller amount.

tokenPercentageFieldArray.emptyRowHint: Select an asset and percentage for each conversion row.

spaceToSpaceMembership.delegatedVotingMemberDescription: The Delegated Voting Member is the individual from your space who is formally authorised to cast votes on behalf of your space within the joining space.

changeSpaceDelegate.delegatedVotingMemberDescription: Select the member from your space who should receive your space's delegated voting power in the chosen governance space.

spaceTransparencySettings.title: Space Transparency
spaceTransparencySettings.description: Define the level of transparency you collectively want to apply to your space. Please note that, regardless of the choice you make below, only direct members can take action in the space.

votingMethodSelector.oneMemberOneVoteDescription: Each member has an equal say in decisions, with no weighting by role, tokens, or stake, ensuring equality and shared power. Commonly used in community or ecosystem spaces.
votingMethodSelector.oneVoiceOneVoteDescription: Each vote is tied to earned voice tokens, reflecting contributions, reputation, and commitment, but decays with inactivity to encourage engagement. Commonly used in core teams or contributor groups.
votingMethodSelector.oneTokenOneVoteDescription: Voting power is proportional to the number of tokens held, aligning influence with stake. Commonly used in value flows, treasury, or investment spaces.
votingMethodSelector.voiceTokenTooltipPrefix: To select this voting method you first need to issue your Voice Token.
votingMethodSelector.tokenTooltipPrefix: To select this voting method, you first need to issue a token.

entryMethod.label: Entry Method
entryMethod.openAccessDescription: New members can join instantly. Participation is open to everyone and fully transparent.
entryMethod.inviteRequestDescription: New members can participate by requesting an invitation to join. Existing members vote on invite requests. Participation is only open to invited members but remains fully transparent to everyone.
entryMethod.tokenBasedDescription: New members can join if they meet token requirements. Participation is only open to eligible members but remains fully transparent to everyone.

transparency.discoverabilityNetwork: Your space is only discoverable by Hypha Network Members.
transparency.discoverabilityOrganisation: Your space is only discoverable by members of your organisation.
transparency.discoverabilitySpace: Your space is only discoverable by space members.
transparency.activityPublic: Access to your space activity is not restricted and visible publicly.
transparency.activityNetwork: Access to your space's activity is restricted to Hypha Network members.
transparency.activityOrganisation: Access to your space activity is restricted to members of your organisation.
transparency.activitySpace: Access to your space activity is restricted to space members.

mintTokens.description: Mint tokens into your space treasury to fund operations, distribute rewards, or provide liquidity.
mintTokens.exceedsLimit: The number of tokens requested exceeds the Mint Amount Limit. Please enter a value up to {limit}
mintTokens.noTokensPrefix: Your space has not yet created a token,

tokenBurning.noTokensPrefix: Your space has not yet created a token,
tokenBurning.tokenBurnDescription: Remove (burn) tokens from chosen spaces or wallet addresses. This action reduces the total token supply and can be used to manage circulation or correct allocations.
tokenBurning.addressAutofillHint: Address auto-populated from selected member or space.
tokenBurning.burnAmountExceedsBalance: The burn amount exceeds the recipient’s token balance. Enter a smaller amount to continue.
tokenBurning.allBalanceWarning: When 'All balance' is selected, the entire token balance for this member or space will be permanently burned.

tokenPayoutFieldArray.enterAmountAndToken: Please enter an amount and select a token.

acceptInvestment.escrowNotice: This proposal uses escrow for the investment. Once it is approved, the investor ({investor}) deposits their side into escrow from their profile or space page, and {activeSpace}'s deposit is made when the proposal is approved and executed.

acceptInvestmentForm.notMemberRevert: The chain rejected this transaction: the connected wallet is not a member or delegate of this space. Use a wallet that belongs to the space, or connect as a delegate.
acceptInvestmentForm.walletRejected: The transaction was not signed or was rejected in your wallet. Try again and approve the request.
acceptInvestmentForm.escrowNotConfigured: The escrow contract address is not configured. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_ESCROW_IMPLEMENTATION_ADDRESS in apps/web/.env to your deployed EscrowImplementation proxy on the governance chain (Base mainnet in production), restart the dev server or redeploy the app, then try again. Deploy the contract from packages/storage-evm (see scripts/escrow-proxy.deploy.ts) if you do not have an address yet.

exchangeStakesAndTokens.escrowNotice: This proposal uses escrow for the exchange. Once it is approved, each member deposits their side into escrow from their profile; if {activeSpace} is one of the parties, its deposit is made when the proposal is approved and executed.

errors.sellerAmountExceedsBalance: The entered amount is greater than the seller available balance.
errors.sellerAmountTooSmall: Amount is too small for this token's decimals. Try a larger value.
errors.buyerAmountTooSmall: Amount is too small for this token's decimals. Try a larger value.
errors.sellerTreasuryUnavailable: Could not load the space treasury. Wait for chain data and try again.
errors.sellerBalanceCheckFailed: Could not verify seller balance. Check your connection and try again.
errors.memberSellerWalletMismatch: Exchange funding uses your connected wallet. Connect the same wallet as the seller address, or choose the member seller whose address matches your wallet.
errors.escrowTokenInvalid: A token row uses the escrow contract address. Use the ERC-20 token contract for seller and buyer tokens.
errors.insufficientSellerBalance: The connected wallet does not hold enough seller tokens. Fund the smart wallet that matches the seller address.
errors.tokenWhitelistBlocked: This token's on-chain rules block sending it to escrow (e.g. transfer/receive whitelist). Choose another token or update the token's whitelist settings.
errors.safeErc20TransferFailed: The token contract rejected the transfer to escrow (often balance, allowance, or non-transferable rules). Check that your smart wallet holds enough tokens and that the token allows transfers to the escrow.

errors.missingStartDate: Each milestone must have a start date
errors.firstMilestoneFuture: First milestone must be in the future
errors.futureDateMustBeLater: The future payment date must be later than the current date

investment.title: Investment terms
investment.fundingTreasuryThenMint: Taken from treasury when available; any remainder is minted.
investment.partyAFundedHint: Space leg funded at proposal execution: {funded}

voting.submittingVote: Submitting your vote — waiting for confirmation…

withdrawResubmit.title: Withdraw your proposal or edit and submit again?
withdrawResubmit.withdrawDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to withdraw this proposal? It will no longer appear on the Proposal screen and cannot be recovered.
withdrawResubmit.resubmitDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to resubmit this proposal? The current proposal will be withdrawn, a new one will be created with your content, and votes will be reset.

noParticipation.subtitle: No votes were recorded for this proposal. Without any participation, this proposal will be rejected.
noParticipation.completedMessage: Decision recorded: Proposal rejected due to no participation.

insufficientParticipation.subtitle: Participation was too low for this proposal to be approved. This proposal will be rejected.
insufficientParticipation.completedMessage: Decision recorded: Proposal rejected due to insufficient participation.

lackAlignment.subtitle: Participation was sufficient, but support was too divided. This proposal will be rejected.
lackAlignment.completedMessage: Decision recorded: Proposal rejected due to lack of alignment.

approved.subtitle: This proposal has met all requirements and is approved as a new agreement.
approved.completedMessage: Decision recorded: Proposal approved and moved to the Accepted section.

insufficientParticipationAndAlignment.subtitle: Participation was too low, and support was too divided. This proposal will be rejected.
insufficientParticipationAndAlignment.completedMessage: Decision recorded: Proposal rejected due to insufficient participation and lack of alignment.

ProposalDetails.archiveTokenDescription: Archiving a token will disable its use in new proposals and transfers.
ProposalDetails.noTokenCreated: Your space has not yet created a token, {clickHere} to first issue a token.
ProposalDetails.maxSupplyValidation: Enter a maximum supply greater than 0, or disable limited supply if you want unlimited supply.
ProposalDetails.tokenPriceGreaterThanZero: Please enter a token price greater than 0
ProposalDetails.spaceInformationMissing: Space information is missing. Please try again.

AiPanel.title: Hypha AI

suggestions.spaceHealth: How is our space doing overall?
suggestions.nextSignal: What signal should we create or share next?
suggestions.valueFlows: How does value flow through our tokens?

AiPanel.welcome: I'm your space AI for bringing coherence to strategy, motion to operations, and meaning to impact, with specialist agents gliding in whenever you call for them.
AiPanel.signIn: Sign in to use Hypha AI
AiPanel.streamError: An error occurred while generating the response.
AiPanel.assistantExpiredSubtitle: Your Hypha Network contribution expired {expiredElapsed}. Please reactivate your space before using Hypha AI.
AiPanel.welcomeSpecialistsHint: Active specialists also appear under Members > AI Agents.

HumanChatPanel.title: Chat
HumanChatPanel.welcome: Welcome to the chat! Start a conversation with other members of this space.
HumanChatPanel.newlineHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline · :emoji:
HumanChatPanel.connectionLostDescription: Chat sync paused because the network dropped. Retry when you're back online.
HumanChatPanel.connectionFollowerTitle: Chat is open in another tab
HumanChatPanel.connectionFollowerDescription: Human Chat syncs in one browser tab at a time to stay reliable during calls.
HumanChatPanel.tabChatWithMentionCount: {tabLabel}, {count, plural, one {# unread mention} other {# unread mentions}}
HumanChatPanel.tabMentionsWithMentionCount: {tabLabel}, {count, plural, one {# unread mention} other {# unread mentions}}
HumanChatPanel.membersCount: {count, plural, one {# member} other {# members}} · {online} online
HumanChatPanel.editAttachmentsNotSupported: Attachments are not supported when editing a message
HumanChatPanel.editMediaRequiresAttachment: Keep at least one attachment when editing this message.
HumanChatPanel.editMediaMatrixUnavailable: Chat is still connecting. Try editing this message again in a moment.
HumanChatPanel.contextDeleteConfirmDescription: This removes the message for everyone in the chat. You cannot undo this.
HumanChatPanel.messageDeleteFailed: Could not delete message. Try again.
HumanChatPanel.mentionNoMembers: No members loaded yet — try again in a moment
HumanChatPanel.mentionListHintIncludesParentSpaceMember: Choose a member to mention. This list may include members from the parent space.
HumanChatPanel.mentionInboxBellCallRingHint: Click the bell to mute or unmute call ring alerts. Open the Mentions tab to see @ mentions.
HumanChatPanel.mentionInboxBellCallRingUnmutedAria: Call join alerts on. Click to mute the call chime for this space.
HumanChatPanel.mentionInboxBellCallRingMutedAria: Call join alerts muted. Click to turn the call chime back on.
HumanChatPanel.mentionInboxEmpty: No mentions in this chat yet.
HumanChatPanel.mentionInboxBellAria: {count, plural, one {# unread mention} other {# unread mentions}}
HumanChatPanel.dictationNotSupported: Dictation is not supported in this browser.
HumanChatPanel.dictationError: Dictation stopped due to an error. Try again.
HumanChatPanel.voiceRecordingNotSupported: Voice recording is not supported in this browser.
HumanChatPanel.voiceMicPermissionDenied: Microphone access was denied. Allow the mic to record a voice message.
HumanChatPanel.reactionToggleFailed: Could not update reaction. Try again.
HumanChatPanel.sendFailed: Could not send message. Try again.
HumanChatPanel.sendUploadTimedOut: Upload timed out. Try a smaller file or check your connection.
HumanChatPanel.sendRateLimited: The chat server is limiting uploads. Wait a few seconds and try again, or send fewer files at once.
HumanChatPanel.unreadBannerCount: {count, plural, one {# new message since {time} on {date}} other {# new messages since {time} on {date}}}
HumanChatPanel.callJoinStripLine: Call in progress — {count, plural, one {1 member} other {# members}}
HumanChatPanel.callFollowerSyncPausedDescription: Sync paused — switch tab for the live call.
HumanChatPanel.callJoinCallAlertsUnmuted: Call alerts: on (chime and optional notification when a call starts).
HumanChatPanel.callJoinCallAlertsAria: Call alerts: chime and optional notification for join opportunities
HumanChatPanel.callJoinCallAlertsMuteAction: Mute call alerts (no chime or notification for new calls)
HumanChatPanel.callJoinWithAudio: Join the space call with microphone
HumanChatPanel.callJoinWithVideo: Join the space call with camera and microphone
HumanChatPanel.callJoinNotificationBody: {count, plural, one {Someone in this space started a call (# device in the call).} other {Someone in this space started a call (# devices in the call).}}
HumanChatPanel.callJoinInviteDescription: {count, plural, one {Someone is in a call in this space (# device connected). Join now?} other {Someone is in a call in this space (# devices connected). Join now?}}
HumanChatPanel.callBannerInCallSoloLine1: In this call — {count, plural, one {1 member} other {# members}}
HumanChatPanel.callBannerInCallWithOthers: In this call — {count, plural, one {1 member} other {# members}} · {otherCount, plural, one {1 other} other {# others}}
HumanChatPanel.callMembersTabJoinCallTitle: A call is active in this space
HumanChatPanel.callMembersTabJoinCallBody: Open the Chat tab and use Join audio or Join video, or the phone and camera in the header, to join the same call. Everyone in this space uses one shared call.
HumanChatPanel.callMembersTabInCallPreamble: {count, plural, one {# person in the call} other {# people in the call}} (Matrix):
HumanChatPanel.callAudio: Start voice call in this space
HumanChatPanel.callVideo: Start video call in this space
HumanChatPanel.callActiveInSpace: Space call (everyone in this space can join)
HumanChatPanel.callRemoteParticipantMediaStalled: Waiting for audio/video — check network or try leaving and rejoining.
HumanChatPanel.callRemoteMediaStallHint: Others are listed in this call but their audio/video is not arriving — often a network or browser issue. Try leaving and rejoining, or switch networks.
HumanChatPanel.callTurnServerUnavailableHint: Voice, video, and screen share may be unreliable — the Matrix server is not providing TURN relay servers. Ask your administrator to verify coturn and Dendrite turn configuration.
HumanChatPanel.callRemoteMediaWarmingHint: Waiting for others' audio and video to connect…
HumanChatPanel.callScaleWarningMessage: This call has many participants. Quality may be reduced.
HumanChatPanel.callSessionRefreshFailedDescription: Your call session expired. Reconnect to stay in the meeting.
HumanChatPanel.callShareTabAudioNotShared: Tab audio not shared — others may not hear sound from your shared tab or window.
HumanChatPanel.callShareTabAudioPickerHint: Enable Share tab audio in the browser picker.
HumanChatPanel.callShareTabAudioPromptDescription: When your browser asks what to share, turn on Share tab audio (for a tab or window) so others can hear sound. Hypha can't add audio after sharing starts.
HumanChatPanel.callErrorPermission: Call start was blocked by permissions (camera/microphone or room call permissions).
HumanChatPanel.callErrorPermissionGuidance: Allow camera/microphone in your browser and ensure this room allows members to start calls, then try again.
HumanChatPanel.callErrorGeneric: Could not start the call. Try again.
HumanChatPanel.callErrorConnectStall: The call could not connect. This is often caused by missing Matrix TURN server setup or a restrictive network.
HumanChatPanel.callErrorNotReady: The call server is not ready yet. Wait a moment, then try again.
HumanChatPanel.callErrorNoClient: You are not connected to chat. Check your connection, then try again.
HumanChatPanel.callErrorNoRoom: This conversation is not available. Go back to the space, then try again.
HumanChatPanel.callTabBackgroundHint: The call continues while this tab is in the background. Return here to manage audio and video.
HumanChatPanel.callErrorScreenshare: Screen share could not start. Try again, or check browser permissions for this site.
HumanChatPanel.callScreenshareBlockedRemoteActive: Someone else is sharing — ask them to stop before you share.
HumanChatPanel.callScreenshareRequestTakeover: Someone else is sharing — click to request screen share.
HumanChatPanel.callScreenshareTakeoverIncomingBody: {name} wants to share their screen. If you approve, your share will stop and theirs will begin.
HumanChatPanel.callScreenshareTakeoverPendingBody: The person currently sharing their screen needs to approve before you can share.
HumanChatPanel.callScreenshareTakeoverDeniedBody: The current presenter declined your screen share request.
HumanChatPanel.callParticipantCount: · {count, plural, one {# in call} other {# in call}}
HumanChatPanel.callYouAreSharingScreenHint: Others can see your screen. You won't see your own share here.
HumanChatPanel.callFullViewDescription: Larger view of the call. Your space call stays active when you close this window.
HumanChatPanel.callLayoutSideBySide: Share and people side by side

HumanChatPanel.callCaptureConfirmStopRecording: Capture will stop and be saved to Space Memory.
HumanChatPanel.callCaptureConfirmStopTranscript: Transcript capture is still active. Stop and save the transcript now?
HumanChatPanel.callCaptureOffHint: Capture is off. No recording or transcript will be saved for this call.
HumanChatPanel.callCaptureLeaveWarning: Capture is off. Press Leave again to confirm leaving without a recording.
HumanChatPanel.callCaptureConsentLocal: You are capturing this call ({mode}). Others are notified.
HumanChatPanel.callCaptureConsentJoin: This call is being captured ({mode}) by {actor}. Joining indicates your consent.
HumanChatPanel.callCaptureConsentLegalNote: Recording and transcription may be stored in this space's memory.
HumanChatPanel.callCaptureVoiceStartedRecordingTranscri: This call is now being recorded and transcribed.
HumanChatPanel.callCaptureVoiceStartedTranscript: This call is now being transcribed.
HumanChatPanel.callCaptureLimitDurationWarn: Recording is approaching the 90-minute limit ({minutes} min left). Consider stopping soon so upload can finish.
HumanChatPanel.callCaptureLimitDurationCritical: Recording is near the 90-minute limit ({minutes} min left). Stop capture soon to avoid losing the file.
HumanChatPanel.callCaptureLimitSizeWarn: Recording size is approaching the upload limit (~{sizeMb} MB left).
HumanChatPanel.callCaptureLimitSizeCritical: Recording is near the upload size limit (~{sizeMb} MB left). Stop capture soon.
HumanChatPanel.composerLockedPlaceholder: Only selected team members can interact in this thread.
HumanChatPanel.signalTeamInteractionRestricted: Only selected team members can send messages and mentions in this thread.
HumanChatPanel.signalTeamBannerReadOnly: This is a dedicated Signal team channel. Only selected team members can reply to keep it focused.
HumanChatPanel.signalTeamMemberListHint: Select members who can message, mention, and join thread calls.
HumanChatPanel.mentionOpenFallbackRoom: We could not resolve that room from your local context. Open the related space and try again.
HumanChatPanel.mentionOpenFallbackMissingMessage: That mention message is not available in the loaded timeline yet. Try again in a moment.

CoherenceTab.spaceMemoryLoadMoreError: Could not load more items. Try again.
CoherenceTab.spaceMemoryCallRecordingNoUrl: Recording will be available when a media URL is ingested for this session.

purpose.focus: Mission, strategic alignment, and long-term direction
roleDefinition: Links daily work to mission and measurable priorities.
Surfaces blindspots and trade-offs before you commit.
Turns vision into clear decision criteria and outcomes.

governance.focus: Decision rights, proposal quality, and coordination
roleDefinition: Keeps proposals clear, accountable, and executable.
Improves vote readiness with assumptions and stakeholder impact.
Adds light guardrails that reduce drag without killing autonomy.
Turns strategy into owners, milestones, and timelines.
Flags bottlenecks early with practical sequencing options.
Steadies delivery with operating rhythms and feedback loops.
Improves onboarding and clarity so more people contribute well.
Spots drop-offs and suggests retention and activation moves.
Balances openness with trust and sustainable participation.

finance.focus: Treasury, tokens, and capital allocation trade-offs
roleDefinition: Stress-tests token and treasury choices for runway and concentration risk.
Ties spend to strategic priorities and expected outcomes.
Frames allocation options with explicit upside and downside.
Prioritizes by user value, strategic fit, and build leverage.
Designs experiments with measurable learning outcomes.
Aligns roadmap bets with adoption and retention signals.

risk.focus: Weak signals, safeguards, and long-term resilience
roleDefinition: Notices strain and weak signals early so the space can adapt before harm builds.
Proposes caring safeguards with clear owners—enough to stay resilient, not bureaucratic drag.
Keeps commitments aligned with your values and stewardship as the space grows.
Maps dependencies and high-leverage partnership opportunities.
Plans cross-space work with clear owners and mutual outcomes.
Routes external signals to the right spaces quickly.

learning.focus: Knowledge capture, evidence, and improvement loops
roleDefinition: Turns discussions and experiments into reusable knowledge.
Builds feedback loops that sharpen decisions over time.
Clarifies assumptions, metrics, and lessons learned.

reputation.focus: Trust, narrative alignment, and communication risk
roleDefinition: Aligns public narrative with how the space actually operates.
Flags reputation risks early with practical mitigation steps.
Strengthens stakeholder communication in change and conflict.

CoherenceTab.spaceMemoryEmptyTab: No items found in this view.

CoherenceTab.spaceMemoryCallsEmpty: No call recordings or transcripts yet. They appear here after a recorded group call ends.
